text: Run a real bootstrap trial in a fresh host project

Has been done immediately before v0.2.0, which resulted in significant improvement. But the installation and embedding are still somewhat awkward, maybe there are ways to improve it. Also skill-embedding has not fully been tested

main remaining gap per last run: skill-embedding not fully tested (symlink path fix was just landed in this session). Next trial should specifically exercise: install in repo with existing .claude/, verify skill shows up to agent, verify agent can use git toc alias.
